text: Upon signing of this Subcontract, the Subcontractor shall submit Certificates of Insurance in duplicate evidencing all of the above coverage. Attached to each certificate of insurance shall be a copy of the additional insured endorsement that is part of the Subcontractor's Commercial General Liability Policy. The Subcontractor hereby acknowledges and agrees that Contractor is entitled to rely upon all representations provided in the Certificates of Insurance. The failure of the Subcontractor to provide and maintain during all relevant periods the insurance required by this Subcontract shall constitute a material breach hereunder, for which the Contractor may exercise its remedies as provided in this Subcontract.
